title: Compatible 3330 3335 3345 Drum Cartridge 30000 Pages for Xerox Phaser 3330dni WorkCentre 3335dni 3345dni Printers 101R00555 Drum Unit
features: Package Contents - - Include 1 pack compatible Xerox 3330 3335 3345 drum cartridge 101R00555. It need to work with 106R03621 106R03622 106R03623 106R03624 toner cartridges.
Compatible Printers - - Suitable for use in Xerox Phaser 3330 3330dni, Xerox WorkCentre 3335 3335dni 3345 3345dni printers.
High Print Yields - - Up to 30,000 pages per drum cartridge, 5% coverage at A4 pager, based on ISO / IEC 19752.
Print Advantages - - Refined toner powder and high-quality cartridge, deliver accurate bright color, sharp black and crisp graphics.
Reliable Warranty - - Timely after-sales and quality assurance services, let you to enjoy the fun of printing easily.
